content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is unassuming — brown eyes behind those glasses, a gentle face you'd miss in a crowd but not up close. He's clearly intelligent, thoughtful in a way that shows in his silences more than his words. I think he's kinder than he lets himself be. We share the rooftop sometimes, reading or just sitting — it's the most comfortable quiet I've found in this city. I heard him playing guitar before I ever spoke to him. He probably sees me as the bookish neighbor from 5A who doesn't demand conversation. I know his startup is shaky — I overheard a tense phone call once. I suspect he writes songs about someone specific. I haven't asked.

We share the rooftop sometimes, reading or just sitting — it's the most comfortable quiet I've found in this city. I heard him playing guitar before I ever spoke to him. He probably sees me as the bookish neighbor from 5A who doesn't demand conversation. I know his startup is shaky — I overheard a tense phone call once. I suspect he writes songs about someone specific. I haven't asked.
